subject: [RFC PATCH 06/45] mm: page_alloc: remove watermark boost mechanism

2026-04-30.patch_summary: This patch removes the watermark boost mechanism, a feature introduced to react to fragmentation events at the pageblock granularity. The mechanism was found to be ineffective in superpageblock environments and caused unnecessary wakeups of kswapd even when free memory was abundant. The patch drops several related functions and variables, including boost_watermark(), ZONE_BOOSTED_WATERMARK flag, and watermark_boost_factor sysctl. This change aims to simplify the page allocation code and reduce unnecessary workloads on the system.
